critical.mandate: Check for WIP checkpoint before starting

step.title: Check WIP
step.check: Validate checksums (shasum -a 256) for each entry in files_touched — flag DELETED or MODIFIED files, offer Proceed / Start fresh / Review before resuming
Offer to resume from last checkpoint or start fresh

step.title: Implement
step.action: Write checkpoint after each step — include files_touched with path, checksum (shasum -a 256), last_modified (ISO 8601) for all files created/modified

step.title: Complete
step.action: Report implementation complete with files changed
